products.name: DA 22-BLDC
products.descriptor: 22 mm brushless-DC motor UAV servo actuator

evidence.snippet:
Datasheet DA 22-BLDC
pdf
1.4 MB
[Download](/fileadmin/user_upload/Downloads/Datasheets/DA-22-BLDC-Datenblatt_Rev_H.pdf "Datasheet DA 22-BLDC")

With eleven Volz actuators, Thales’s UAS100 long-range uncrewed air system can rely on actuation capabilities that meet the highest safety and reliability requirements. The DA 22 BLDC based servos will be fundamentally redeveloped under EASA regulations to achieve DAL B (Design Assurance Level - B).
[READ MORE](/company/news/detail/first-easa-certified-uas-thales-joins-forces-with-volz/)

products.name: DA 30-MCCS
products.descriptor: 30 mm OPV servo with electromagnetic clutch

evidence.snippet:
### DA 30-MCCS - CCD
DA 30-MCCS - CCD
pdf
225.1 KB
[Download](/fileadmin/user_upload/Downloads/CCD/DA_30-MCCS_Configuration_Control_477-6000-05-A_unspecific.pdf "DA 30-MCCS - CCD")

### OPV actuators
*   Electromagnetic clutch allows actuator to be disengaged from output shaft, allowing the pilot to take control
*   New, patent-pending design eliminates the need for the external sensor and increases overall reliability and MTBF
*   Certified to IP 67 standard to withstand high environmental requirements (DO 160 G)
[OPV ACTUATORS](/actuators/opv-actuators/)

unresolved_questions: DA 15-N.ISS suffix meaning not explained in corpus — 'ISS' may denote In-Service Support or a specific interface standard.
DA 20-TS suffix 'S' meaning not explained — possibly sensor-equipped or switch variant.
MCCS suffix meaning not confirmed on fetched pages — electromagnetic clutch system for optional piloted vehicles inferred from AAM page description.
No NDAA Section 848/889 claims found anywhere in corpus; all 28 SKUs marked unknown.
No DIU Blue UAS Cleared List claims found in corpus; all 28 SKUs marked unknown.
Individual product detail pages (/actuators/detail/da-XX) were all skipped_class_budget; torque/weight specs and any product-level compliance claims are unverified.
Whether the DA 22-BLDC being redeveloped under EASA regulations for Thales affects the standard catalog version is unclear from available pages.

fetch_requests.reason: Category page for standard actuators — would clarify variant naming (N, HT, BLDC suffixes) and reveal any SKUs absent from the datasheets index.
Category page for Duplex/redundant actuators — would confirm full SKU list and specs for DA 26-D, DA 30-D, DA 30-HT-D, DA 58-D.
Category page for OPV/MCCS actuators — would confirm full MCCS SKU list and electromagnetic-clutch feature details.
Category page for submersible actuators — would confirm depth ratings and whether additional SUB SKUs exist beyond DA 22-SUB and DA 26-SUB.
Product selector tool — may expose additional SKUs or variant combinations not listed individually on the datasheets page.
Whitepaper download page — may contain compliance (NDAA, DO-160, DO-178C) or Blue UAS claims at the product level.
